description:
Adds a "SMS" button to the hr.applicant form view header, next to the
existing Studio-added "Req Info" / "n8n" / "Remind" buttons. The
button is visible only when the applicant is in an SMS-eligible state
AND the matching x_studio_sms_*_date is not yet stamped:

  - Stage 1 (New) with attachment_number == 0 and x_studio_sms_new_reminder_date null
  - Stage 2 (Qualification) with x_studio_sms_reminder_date null
  - Stage 7 (Assessment Sent) with x_studio_assessment_sms_reminder_date null

Clicking the button fires the bicc_recruitment.send_sms_button server
action from changeset 017, which opens the SMS preview popup with the
Cancel / SMS Sent buttons in the modal footer.

Implementation: inherits hr_recruitment.hr_applicant_view_form and
inserts the button after action_talent_pool_add_applicants (the same
anchor Studio uses for its three existing buttons). Adds the three
x_studio_sms_*_date fields plus attachment_number as invisible fields
inside the sheet so the button's invisible expression can reference
them.

Depends on changeset 017 for the server action and the
x_studio_sms_preview field.
